sentences.target: Die Zuschauer klatschen nach dem Lied.

translations.de: Die Zuschauer klatschen nach dem Lied.
translations.en: The audience claps after the song.
translations.es: El público aplaude al terminar la canción.
translations.fr: Le public applaudit à la fin de la chanson.
translations.it: Il pubblico applaude alla fine della canzone.
translations.yue: 觀眾喺首歌完咗之後拍手。
translations.pt: O público aplaude no fim da música.
translations.vi: Khán giả vỗ tay khi bài hát kết thúc.
translations.nl: Het publiek klapt na het liedje.
translations.hu: A közönség a dal végén tapsol.
translations.hi: गाना खत्म होते ही दर्शक तालियाँ बजाते हैं.
translations.pl: Publiczność bije brawo po zakończeniu piosenki.
translations.el: Το κοινό χειροκροτεί στο τέλος του τραγουδιού.
translations.id: Penonton bertepuk tangan setelah lagu selesai.
translations.ja: 曲が終わると観客が拍手する。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative plural; agrees with 'Zuschauer' as subject.
Common noun; masculine; plural nominative; subject of 'klatschen'.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person plural.
Preposition governing dative; temporal meaning 'after'.
Definite article; dative singular neuter; with 'Lied' after 'nach'.
Common noun; neuter; singular dative; object of 'nach'.

sentences.target: Neben mir lacht ein Zuschauer über den Witz.
sentences.reading: /ˈneːbən miːɐ̯ laxt aɪ̯n ˈt͡suːʃaʊ̯ɐ ˈyːbɐ deːn vɪt͡s/

translations.de: Neben mir lacht ein Zuschauer über den Witz.
translations.ipa: /ˈneːbən miːɐ̯ laxt aɪ̯n ˈt͡suːʃaʊ̯ɐ ˈyːbɐ deːn vɪt͡s/
translations.en: Next to me, a spectator laughs at the joke.
translations.es: A mi lado, un espectador se ríe del chiste.
translations.fr: À côté de moi, un spectateur rit de la blague.
translations.it: Accanto a me, uno spettatore ride alla battuta.
translations.ko: 내 옆에서 관객 한 명이 농담에 웃는다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我旁边有位观众听到笑话笑了。
translations.yue: 我旁邊有個觀眾聽到個笑話笑咗。
translations.ru: Рядом со мной зритель смеётся над шуткой.
translations.pt: Ao meu lado, um espectador ri da piada.
translations.vi: Bên cạnh tôi, một khán giả cười vì câu đùa.
translations.nl: Naast mij lacht een toeschouwer om de grap.
translations.uk: Поруч зі мною глядач сміється над жартом.
translations.hu: Mellettem egy néző nevet a viccen.
translations.hi: मेरे बगल में एक दर्शक मज़ाक पर हँसता है.
translations.pl: Obok mnie widz śmieje się z żartu.
translations.el: Δίπλα μου ένας θεατής γελάει με το αστείο.
translations.nb: Ved siden av meg ler en publikummer av vitsen.
translations.id: Di sebelah saya, seorang penonton tertawa karena lelucon itu.
translations.sv: Bredvid mig skrattar en åskådare åt skämtet.
translations.ro: Lângă mine, un spectator râde la glumă.
translations.cs: Vedle mě se divák směje vtipu.
translations.da: Ved siden af mig griner en tilskuer af vittigheden.
translations.ja: 隣で観客がその冗談に笑っている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; governs dative; spatial meaning 'beside/next to'.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; complement of 'Neben'.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular.
Indefinite article; nominative singular masculine; with 'Zuschauer' as subject.
Common noun; masculine; singular nominative; subject of 'lacht'.
Preposition governing accusative (topic/subject 'about'); forms PP with 'Witz'.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine; with 'Witz'.
Common noun; masculine; singular accusative; object of 'über'.

translations.en: I'm filming the audience for a moment.
translations.es: Estoy grabando al público un momento.
translations.fr: Je filme le public un instant.
translations.it: Sto filmando il pubblico per un attimo.
translations.pt: Estou filmando o público por um instante.
translations.vi: Tôi quay khán giả một chút.
translations.hi: मैं थोड़ी देर के लिए दर्शकों को फिल्मा रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: 少し観客を撮っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular.
Adverb; manner/duration modifier of 'filme'.
Definite article; accusative plural; with 'Zuschauer' as direct object.
Common noun; masculine; plural accusative; direct object of 'filme'.

sentences.target: Die Band spielt extra für die Zuschauer.
sentences.reading: /diː bɛnt ʃpiːlt ˈɛkstʁa fyːɐ̯ diː ˈt͡suːʃaʊ̯ɐ/

translations.de: Die Band spielt extra für die Zuschauer.
translations.ipa: /diː bɛnt ʃpiːlt ˈɛkstʁa fyːɐ̯ diː ˈt͡suːʃaʊ̯ɐ/
translations.en: The band is playing especially for the audience.
translations.es: La banda toca especialmente para el público.
translations.fr: Le groupe joue spécialement pour le public.
translations.it: La band suona apposta per il pubblico.
translations.ko: 밴드는 관객들을 위해 특별히 연주하고 있다.
translations.yue: 樂隊係專登為觀眾演奏。
translations.pt: A banda toca especialmente para o público.
translations.vi: Ban nhạc biểu diễn đặc biệt dành cho khán giả.
translations.nl: De band speelt speciaal voor het publiek.
translations.hu: A zenekar kifejezetten a közönségnek játszik.
translations.hi: बैंड खास तौर पर दर्शकों के लिए बजाता है.
translations.el: Το συγκρότημα παίζει ειδικά για το κοινό.
translations.id: Band itu bermain khusus untuk penonton.
translations.ja: バンドは観客のために特別に演奏している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine; with 'Band' as subject.

Common noun; masculine; plural accusative; complement of 'für'.
